artifacts.purpose: Canonical cross-agent contract, byte-identical to the toolkit template as of this reconciliation (Prime Invariants, universal invariants, bootstrap handoff, source-of-truth order, operator vocabulary, verification, git safety)
Everything specific to this repo, extending AGENTS.md: mission detail, reading order, the repo-specific slice operator, verification commands, remotes, git-safety earned practices, style, project map
Narrow push-only policy (ask); points to .agents/repo-guidance.md for the fuller git-safety contract
Claude Code shim importing AGENTS.md plus harness-specific notes (hooks, slash commands)
Gemini/Antigravity shim pointing at AGENTS.md
Canonical current state: active work, queue, blockers, open questions, handoff log (cap 200 lines, 3 handoffs)
Canonical append-only ledger of settled decisions and supersessions
Executable procedures behind the trigger vocabulary (catchup, plan, decision, handoff, drift, slice)
Active process doc (D-2026-06-20-6): the code->GPT-review->fix loop governing ue-r2-* convergence slices
Pointer stub to docs/STATE.md for tools expecting the standard layout; holds no content
Pointer stub to docs/DECISIONS.md; holds no content
Machine-readable map: workspace layout, verification commands and policy, canonical fact-bearing and guidance paths
This inventory of durable agent-facing artifacts
Record of the 2026-06-07 bootstrap migration and the 2026-07-03 reconciliation: every governance artifact, verdict, destination
Harvest report of incident-earned rules generalizable to other repos (no dropbox configured)
Antigravity workspace skills mirroring catchup/handoff triggers
Human-readable status index of the two-agent review loop
Structured coder/reviewer handoff channel: findings, ready sentinels, verdicts, wait scripts (committed audit trail)
Append-only journal, newest first; write-only with respect to current state
Long-horizon backlog; actionable queue lives in docs/STATE.md and REVIEW.md
Claude Code slash-command wrappers resolving to PROTOCOL.md procedures, including the new playbook.md
Claude Code hooks: SessionStart context injection, PreCompact preservation hints, and the new AGENTS.md pre-edit tripwire
Advisory PreToolUse hook script: reminds an agent editing AGENTS.md that it is governance-only and gated
Hook scripts, doc lint, and migration helpers (context.sh, catchup.sh, precompact.sh, check-docs.sh, migrate-status-headers.sh)
CI enforcement: code changes must touch docs/STATE.md; doc lint must pass
Portable workflow for reviews (reviewloop template)
Agy harness hooks: SessionStart context injection
Codex harness hooks: SessionStart context injection and AGENTS.md pre-edit tripwire
Advisory PreToolUse hook script for Codex
Grok harness hooks: PostCompact context injection
